title: RPG Extra Inventory
body:
# RPG Extra Inventory — Skyrim-Inspired Inventory for Minecraft

> ⚠️ **Proof of Concept / Work in Progress**  
> This mod is currently **experimental** and **not intended for a standard survival playthrough**.

---

## ✨ Overview

**RPG Inventory** is a Fabric mod that aims to **completely redesign how Minecraft’s inventory works**, shifting it toward a **true RPG experience** inspired by games like **Skyrim**.

This is not a simple UI tweak.  
The goal is to **change how players interact with items, equipment, and their character** in a more immersive and role-play-oriented way.

---

## Current State – Please Read Before Installing

🚧 **RPG Extra Inventory is a Proof of Concept (PoC)**

This means:
- The mod is **actively under development**
- It **may reduce the fluidity of the Minecraft experience**
- It **may prevent normal game completion**
- **Bugs are expected and normal**

👉 Do **not** install this mod on important worlds.  
👉 Treat it as an **experimental playground**, not a finished product.

---

## ⚠️ Known Compatibility Issues

- The mod **may have issues with _Just Enough Items (JEI)_**
- Some interactions between JEI and the RPG inventory are **currently unstable**
- This will be investigated and improved in future updates

---

## Current Features

✔️ **Fully Reworked Inventory**
- Skyrim-inspired layout and interaction
- Completely different from vanilla Minecraft
- Designed with long-term RPG mechanics in mind
- INFINITE inventory, only weight limits you, a separate file will be created in the world folder, you can stack up 9 223 372 036 854 776 000 items (thats a lot)

✔️ **Advanced Item Customization**
Each item can have:
- 🟣 **Rarity**
- 💰 **Price**
- ⚖️ **Weight**
- 📜 **Lore**

✔️ **Inventory Weight System**
- The player has a **maximum carry weight**
- Fully **configurable**
- **Negative effects** can be applied when overweight (also configurable)

✔️ **Mod Compatibility**
- Compatible with **mods that add new items**
- Systems are designed to be **modular and extensible**

---

## Controls

The mod adds **two new keybinds** (must be configured in controls):

- **RPG Inventory** → Opens the RPG inventory (DEFAULT R)
- **GEAR** → Reserved for a future RPG equipment HUD (DEFAULT G)

> A permanent RPG-style equipment HUD is **planned for the future**.

---

## 🧾 Commands

The mod adds **5 commands**, all starting with `/rpginv`:

- `/rpginv clear <player/@> [item]`  
  Clears items from the **RPG extra inventory** of the selected player, leave item empty to clear the entire inventory.

- `/rpginv count <player/@> [item]`  
  Counts the number of items currently present in the selected player’s RPG inventory.

- `/rpginv give <player/@> [item] <amount>`  
  Gives items **directly into the RPG inventory**.  
  ⚠️ The default Minecraft `/give` command still gives items to the **vanilla inventory**.

- `/rpginv list <player/@>`  
  Lists registered every items in RPG extra inventory of the selected player (used mainly for debugging and testing).

- `/rpginv reload`  
  Reloads RPG inventory data **without restarting the game** (testing/debug purpose).

---

## Planned Features

- RPG equipment HUD
- UI improvements and polish
- Expanded RPG mechanics
- Performance improvements and code cleanup

---

## Current Balancing

Default settings are **NOT representative** of the final vision:

- Some items (e.g. diamond weapons) may have:
  - ❌ no value
  - ❌ no rarity
- Current values exist **only for testing purposes**

---

## Compatibility

- **Mod Loader**: Fabric
- **Fabric API**: `0.18.4`
- **Minecraft Version**: `1.21.1`

---

## Final Notes

**RPG Inventory** is not a finished mod.  
It is a **foundation**, a **concept**, and a **vision** for turning Minecraft into a deeper RPG experience.

If you enjoy:
- experimenting
- testing new systems
- following a mod’s evolution

👉 **This mod is for you.**

---

*Developed with passion by **laamh*** 🖤

You can find me on discord with the same nickname if you really want to give me feedback, it will be much appreciated
